历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 17377 → 14955 → 17064 → 16212. Over the past 4 years, the ranking fluctuated within the range of 14955–17377, with a baseline of about 16212 in 2025, showing an oscillating trend without a clear unilateral direction. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in this province was 73 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 87 in 2025, with continuous slight expansion. In 2026, the plan is 82, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a slight contraction of about 5.7%, leading to a slight easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 62nd, with recent rankings stable in the 48–62 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion events. Its popularity on Douyin is average, not entering the high-heat list, and the application attention is at a medium level. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation, and other majors being traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity. Traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is about 535,000, an increase of about 72,000 (approximately 15.6%) compared to 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 329,000, indicating significantly intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan examinees. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Sichuan (over 80 in science), making it one of the key universities outside the province with a higher enrollment number.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 16,212, the slight contraction in 2026 (82 vs. 87) leading to a slight easing of competition, but the significant increase in the total number of examinees in this province (+15.6%) intensifying overall competition, the two factors together result in slightly more intense competition. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15,853, with a range of 15,353–16,353.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16,353), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
